dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, you couldn't have arrived at a better time. I've been searching for someone resourceful enough to help me with a project.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I've tracked down a source of {quest_item}: rare materials I've been trying to get my hands on for months. The problem is the supply is {location_hint}, deep in territory overrun by {enemy_type}. No merchant will make the trip and I can't leave the forge unattended. If I had enough {quest_item}, I could craft something this settlement hasn't seen in a generation.
dialogueChunks.outro: You'd be doing more than running an errand. You'd be making something extraordinary possible.

playerResponses.text: Tell me where to look. I'll bring back everything I can carry.
Rare materials in dangerous territory? I'll need proper compensation.
I'm not a supply runner. Find another way.

dialogueChunks.intro: Ah, a traveler with capable hands! {player_name}, I've been hoping someone like you would pass through {location}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: There's a recipe I've been perfecting for years: something that could feed this settlement through the harshest winter. But the key ingredient, {quest_item}, only grows in one place, and that place is crawling with {enemy_type}. {target_npc} saw it flourishing {location_hint} just last week, but couldn't get close enough to harvest any. I need someone who can handle themselves out there.
dialogueChunks.outro: Bring me what I need and I'll make sure the whole settlement eats well. You included.

playerResponses.text: A worthy cause. I'll get your ingredients.
I'll do it, but I want the first serving of whatever you cook.
I'm no forager. You'll have to find someone else.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I need to speak with you urgently. I've discovered something that won't wait.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A merchant passing through mentioned a cache of {quest_item} abandoned in a collapsed storehouse {location_hint}. The original owners fled when {enemy_type} moved into the area and never came back for it. That cache is just sitting there, unclaimed, and it's exactly what I need to finish the commission {target_npc} placed with me last month. But the road there is anything but safe.
dialogueChunks.outro: First come, first served: if we don't claim it soon, someone else will. Or the {enemy_type} will destroy it.

playerResponses.text: An unclaimed cache? I'll have it back before anyone else catches wind.
Salvage from dangerous territory doesn't come cheap. What's my share?
Abandoned for a reason, I'd wager. Count me out.

dialogueChunks.intro: Over here, {player_name}! I've been flagging down every capable-looking soul all week. You're the first one who stopped.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Word reached me through a traveling merchant that {target_npc} in a distant settlement has {quest_item} in surplus: exactly what I've been short on for months. They're willing to trade, but someone has to make the journey to {location} and back. The direct route goes {location_hint}, straight through {enemy_type} territory. I'd go myself but I'd be dead before I got halfway.
dialogueChunks.outro: Make the exchange and bring back the goods, and I'll make sure you're well rewarded for the trip.

playerResponses.text: A trade run through hostile territory? I've handled worse.
That's a dangerous road. I expect danger pay on top of whatever you're offering.
Hire a caravan with guards. I work alone.
